faq.q: What size is a US passport photo?
faq.a: 2×2 inches (51×51 mm). For digital submission it must be square, at least 600×600 pixels, JPEG.

faq.q: Can I use AI to edit my US passport photo in 2026?
faq.a: No. As of January 2026 the US State Department rejects digitally enhanced or AI-altered passport photos, including background replacement and beauty filters.

faq.q: How big should my head be in the photo?
faq.a: Chin to crown must be 50–69% of the photo height — about 1 to 1⅜ inches (25–35 mm) in a 2-inch photo.

faq.q: Are glasses allowed?
faq.a: No. Glasses have not been permitted since 2016, except in rare cases with a signed medical exemption from a doctor.
